name: engifoundry
defaultPrompt: Use $engifoundry to plan, execute, review, and close out an engineering task with durable artifacts.

platformNotes.openai: Use .codex-plugin/plugin.json for Codex plugin installation and agents/openai.yaml when supported by Codex/OpenAI surfaces.
platformNotes.claude: Use .claude-plugin/marketplace.json for Claude marketplace installation and .claude-plugin/plugin.json for the plugin package; Claude-compatible surfaces should read SKILL.md frontmatter as the core skill metadata.
platformNotes.kimi: Use .kimi-plugin/plugin.json for direct Kimi Code repository installation with /plugins install https://github.com/caoyuan-fire/engi-foundry-skill. Official marketplace search visibility depends on Kimi marketplace publication outside this repository.
platformNotes.githubCopilot: Use .github/plugin/marketplace.json and .github/plugin/plugin.json for GitHub Copilot CLI plugin marketplace installation.
platformNotes.cursor: Use .cursor-plugin/plugin.json for Cursor plugin installation. Cursor IDE plugin behavior and Cursor Agent CLI behavior may differ by version.
platformNotes.factoryDroid: Use .factory-plugin/marketplace.json and .factory-plugin/plugin.json for Factory Droid plugin marketplace installation.
